mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 5-month increase in industrial production signals a strengthening supply chain that enhances corporate profitability and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in strengthening supply periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in the unemployment rate signals a tightening labor market that compresses wage growth and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in tightening labor periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month decline in housing starts signals a weakening demand for durable goods that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in weakening demand periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month rise in real disposable personal income signals a strengthening demand for consumer goods that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in initial jobless claims signals a weakening labor market that compresses wage growth and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in weakening labor periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month decline in the core CPI signals a weakening monetary policy that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in weakening monetary periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month rise in industrial production and a 2-month decline in housing starts signals a strengthening supply chain and weakening demand for durable goods that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in strengthening supply and weakening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.
